rules.name: Generic split-screen hero
rules.description: Hero has two primary columns; left contains heading, paragraph and CTA; right contains product image or device mockup.

rules.name: Centered SaaS hero
rules.description: Hero contains centered badge, H1, paragraph and one or two CTA buttons.

rules.name: Excessively symmetrical layout
rules.description: More than 75% of primary sections use centered or perfectly balanced alignment.

rules.name: Repeated section template
rules.description: Three or more sections follow eyebrow then heading then paragraph then cards.

rules.name: Identical section spacing
rules.description: More than 80% of sections use the same vertical padding value.

rules.name: Large empty hero area
rules.description: Hero height exceeds 75vh while visible content occupies less than 55% of its bounding box.

rules.name: Excessive max-width container use
rules.description: More than 80% of top-level sections use the same max-width container.

rules.name: Standard 12-column appearance
rules.description: Main content widths repeatedly approximate common 4/8, 5/7 or 6/6 grid splits.

rules.name: Alternating feature sections
rules.description: Three or more image/text sections alternate left and right.

rules.name: Three-card feature row
rules.description: Exactly three similarly sized feature cards appear below a centered heading.

rules.name: Four-step process row
rules.description: Section contains exactly four numbered or icon-based process items.

rules.name: Logo-cloud strip
rules.description: Repeated logos appear between hero and features with generic trust copy.

rules.name: Bento-grid section
rules.description: Unequal rounded cards are arranged in a fashionable bento layout without clear content necessity.

rules.name: Pricing-table cliche
rules.description: Pricing section contains three cards with the middle card emphasized.

rules.name: FAQ near page end
rules.description: Accordion FAQ appears immediately before final CTA or footer.

rules.name: Final CTA banner
rules.description: Last content section is a centered rounded rectangle with heading, paragraph and CTA.

rules.name: Floating decorative objects
rules.description: Absolutely positioned circles, stars, blobs or gradients exist outside meaningful content.

rules.name: Content vertically centered everywhere
rules.description: More than 60% of viewport-height sections use flex centering.

rules.name: Repeated section heading width
rules.description: Most section headings use an identical max-width such as 600-800px.

rules.name: Excessive viewport-height sections
rules.description: Three or more sections use min-height: 100vh without functional need.

rules.name: Excessive cardification
rules.description: More than 60% of meaningful content groups are inside bordered or shadowed containers.

rules.name: Universal rounded cards
rules.description: More than 70% of content containers have border-radius >= 16px.

rules.name: Same radius everywhere
rules.description: One border-radius value is used by more than 70% of rounded elements.

rules.name: Large fashionable radius
rules.description: More than ten elements use radii between 20px and 32px.

rules.name: Pill overuse
rules.description: More than six non-tag elements use border-radius: 9999px or equivalent.

rules.name: Nested rounded containers
rules.description: Rounded cards contain additional rounded cards at least three times.

rules.name: Identical feature cards
rules.description: Three or more sibling cards have nearly identical structure and text length.

rules.name: Icon-heading-paragraph cards
rules.description: Repeated cards follow exactly icon then heading then paragraph.

rules.name: Card title and tiny description
rules.description: Cards repeatedly use one bold line followed by one muted line.

rules.name: Decorative card gradients
rules.description: Card backgrounds use gradients that do not encode state or information.

rules.name: Soft-border card style
rules.description: Many cards use a 1px low-opacity neutral border plus subtle shadow.

rules.name: Floating white cards
rules.description: White cards float over a tinted or gradient page background.

rules.name: Fake dashboard card stack
rules.description: Decorative analytics cards overlap without functional controls.

rules.name: Statistic card row
rules.description: Three or four cards show oversized numbers with tiny labels.

rules.name: Card hover lift everywhere
rules.description: Most cards translate upward and increase shadow on hover.

rules.name: Equal-height content forcing
rules.description: Cards use fixed/min heights primarily to create visual uniformity.

rules.name: Empty card padding
rules.description: Card padding exceeds 32px while actual content is fewer than three lines.

rules.name: Unnecessary card wrappers
rules.description: Semantic sections are wrapped in cards although no grouping distinction exists.

rules.name: Card-with-badge pattern
rules.description: Multiple cards contain an absolute-positioned pill in the top corner.

rules.name: Overlapping testimonial cards
rules.description: Testimonial cards are displayed as floating, rotated or layered decorative objects.

rules.name: Purple-blue AI gradient
rules.description: Large background gradient combines violet, indigo, blue or cyan.

rules.name: Orange-pink AI gradient
rules.description: Large decorative gradient combines orange, coral, pink or purple.

rules.name: Radial glow behind mockup
rules.description: Radial gradient or blurred pseudo-element appears behind product image.

rules.name: Multiple blurred blobs
rules.description: Three or more large blurred gradient shapes are absolutely positioned.

rules.name: Low-contrast pastel palette
rules.description: Most surfaces differ only slightly in luminance and saturation.

rules.name: Single accent applied everywhere
rules.description: One accent color is used for CTAs, badges, icons, links, highlights and decorations.

rules.name: Neutral background plus neon accent
rules.description: Off-white or near-black page uses a single highly saturated accent.

rules.name: Gradient text headline
rules.description: Main H1 uses background-clip: text with a gradient.

rules.name: Gradient borders
rules.description: Border effect is created with nested gradient wrappers or mask composition.

rules.name: Background tint per section
rules.description: Consecutive sections alternate between slightly different neutral tints.

rules.name: Dark navy instead of black
rules.description: Primary text and dark surfaces consistently use blue-black values.

rules.name: Excessive transparency
rules.description: Many colors use alpha values between 0.05 and 0.2.

rules.name: Decorative color without semantics
rules.description: Multiple accent colors appear but do not correspond to categories or states.

rules.name: Perfectly generated palette scale
rules.description: CSS contains mechanically complete 50-950 shade scales while only a few are used.

rules.name: Near-duplicate color tokens
rules.description: Stylesheet defines several almost identical neutral or accent colors.

rules.name: Hard-coded color repetition
rules.description: The same hex value appears more than 15 times instead of using a variable.

rules.name: Excessive CSS gradients
rules.description: More than eight non-functional gradients exist on one page.

rules.name: Hero-only glow
rules.description: Main hero has strong glow effects that disappear from the rest of the design.

rules.name: Artificial spotlight background
rules.description: Hero background combines several radial gradients to imitate studio lighting.

rules.name: Default framework palette
rules.description: Colors strongly match unchanged Tailwind, shadcn or template defaults.

rules.name: Inconsistent inline text colors
rules.description: A single text block (heading, paragraph, button) uses two or more distinct foreground colors, as if one word was recolored mid-sentence.

rules.name: Oversized generic H1
rules.description: H1 is at least 64px desktop and contains fewer than 12 words.

rules.name: Extreme hero headline
rules.description: H1 exceeds 80px without editorial or display-design justification.

rules.name: Predictable typography hierarchy
rules.description: H1, H2, H3 and body sizes map exactly to a conventional modular scale.

rules.name: Same font weight everywhere
rules.description: More than 70% of headings use weight 700 or 800.

rules.name: Excessively bold headline
rules.description: Main H1 uses weight 800-900 with tight letter spacing.

rules.name: Muted gray body copy
rules.description: Most paragraphs use low-contrast gray rather than primary text color.

rules.name: Centered text overuse
rules.description: More than 60% of headings and paragraphs are center-aligned.

rules.name: Narrow centered paragraphs
rules.description: Repeated paragraphs use max-width: 600-700px and auto margins.

rules.name: Uppercase eyebrow labels
rules.description: Three or more sections begin with small uppercase, tracked text.

rules.name: Badge as section eyebrow
rules.description: Rounded pill labels repeatedly replace normal section labels.

rules.name: Generic sans-serif stack
rules.description: Entire page uses Inter, Manrope, Geist, DM Sans or similar without customization.

rules.name: Single font family only
rules.description: Brand, heading, body, labels and data all use one default sans-serif.

rules.name: Artificial line breaks
rules.description: tags are inserted into major headings to force a fashionable composition.

rules.name: Short slogan fragments
rules.description: H1 contains short imperative fragments separated by commas or line breaks.

rules.name: Gradient emphasis word
rules.description: One word in the H1 uses gradient or accent color styling.

rules.name: Highlighted phrase spans
rules.description: Multiple headings wrap a short phrase in an accent-colored <span>.

rules.name: Tiny labels
rules.description: Many labels use 10-12px text with high tracking.

rules.name: Uniform line-height
rules.description: Headings of different sizes use nearly identical line-height ratios.

rules.name: Excessive text balancing
rules.description: text-wrap: balance or equivalent is applied to nearly every heading.

rules.name: Template-like font pairing
rules.description: Common fashionable font pairing appears without brand-specific adjustments.

rules.name: Inconsistent inline fonts in one block
rules.description: A single text block mixes two or more font families, as if one fragment was set in a different face.

rules.name: Excessive page font variety
rules.description: The page uses three or more distinct font families, which reads as an uncurated generated type system.

rules.name: Tiny text beneath headings or buttons
rules.description: A heading or button is immediately followed by very small, barely readable supporting text.

rules.name: Soft shadow everywhere
rules.description: More than ten elements use subtle diffuse shadows.

rules.name: Same shadow token everywhere
rules.description: One shadow declaration is reused for cards, buttons, nav and mockups.

rules.name: Multi-layer luxury shadow
rules.description: Elements use three or more shadow layers for a soft floating effect.

rules.name: Colored glow shadow
rules.description: Box shadows use accent-colored alpha values.

rules.name: Excessive backdrop blur
rules.description: More than three elements use backdrop-filter: blur(...).

rules.name: Glassmorphism navigation
rules.description: Fixed nav has translucent background, border and backdrop blur.

rules.name: Glass cards
rules.description: Cards combine transparency, backdrop blur, light border and shadow.

rules.name: Hairline borders everywhere
rules.description: Most containers use a 1px low-contrast border.

rules.name: Inner highlight border
rules.description: Cards use inset white shadows or pseudo-element highlights.

rules.name: Hover glow effect
rules.description: Buttons or cards gain accent glow on hover.

rules.name: Excessive blur values
rules.description: Stylesheet contains multiple blur values above 40px.

rules.name: Decorative noise overlay
rules.description: Global pseudo-element adds generated noise or grain to mimic premium design.

rules.name: Border-gradient animation
rules.description: Borders rotate or animate through gradients.

rules.name: Spotlight cursor effect
rules.description: Radial gradient follows pointer position over cards or hero.

rules.name: Masked fade edges
rules.description: Carousels or marquees use gradient masks on both edges.

rules.name: Scroll-based fade-in everywhere
rules.description: Nearly every section starts hidden and fades upward into view.

rules.name: Repeated transform scale hover
rules.description: Most interactive elements use transform: scale(1.02-1.05).

rules.name: Excessive drop shadows on images
rules.description: Product screenshots and device mockups use large diffuse shadows.

rules.name: Pseudo-element decoration density
rules.description: Many components use ::before or ::after solely for glow or decoration.

rules.name: Premium sheen animation
rules.description: Button or card contains an animated diagonal highlight sweep.

rules.name: Two-button hero CTA
rules.description: Hero has one primary and one secondary CTA side by side.

rules.name: Primary CTA with arrow icon
rules.description: Main CTA contains text followed by right arrow.

rules.name: Excessively rounded buttons
rules.description: Most buttons use radius above 12px or full pill radius.

rules.name: Large padded CTA
rules.description: Primary button has horizontal padding above 28px and height above 48px.

rules.name: Icon inside rounded square
rules.description: Repeated icons sit inside 40-56px rounded containers.

rules.name: Navbar with logo and one CTA
rules.description: Header contains logo left and a single high-emphasis CTA right.

rules.name: Floating pill navbar
rules.description: Navbar is centered, rounded, detached from viewport edges and shadowed.

rules.name: Sticky blurred navbar
rules.description: Header becomes translucent and blurred on scroll.

rules.name: Generic hamburger implementation
rules.description: Mobile nav uses standard three-line icon and full-screen overlay with no product-specific behavior.

rules.name: Input-plus-button waitlist
rules.description: Hero contains email field and adjacent Join waitlist style CTA.

rules.name: App-store button pair
rules.description: Apple App Store and Google Play buttons appear side by side.

rules.name: Generic social login row
rules.description: Login form shows Google, GitHub or Apple buttons above an or continue with separator.

rules.name: Decorative button animation
rules.description: Primary CTA has glow, shimmer, magnetic or animated-border behavior.

rules.name: Button icon duplication
rules.description: Nearly every button includes a leading or trailing icon.

rules.name: Generic pricing toggle
rules.description: Monthly/annual segmented control appears above pricing cards.

rules.name: Most popular plan badge
rules.description: Middle or recommended pricing card has an absolute pill label.

rules.name: Form field uniformity
rules.description: Every input uses identical oversized radius, border and padding.

rules.name: Generic command palette
rules.description: Search or action control imitates a command palette with shortcut badge.

rules.name: Floating support bubble
rules.description: Bottom-right circular support/chat button exists without contextual integration.

rules.name: Scroll-down indicator
rules.description: Hero includes decorative mouse, arrow or bouncing chevron.

rules.name: Decorative information / announcement bubble
rules.description: A pastel pill or rounded badge carries a short availability, status or announcement label (Coming soon, Beta, New, live dot) as decoration rather than real state.

rules.name: Device mockup hero
rules.description: Hero prominently displays a phone, laptop or browser-window frame.

rules.name: Floating UI fragments
rules.description: Cropped interface cards float around the main product screenshot.

rules.name: Generic dashboard screenshot
rules.description: Product image contains standard charts, cards and side navigation with placeholder-like data.

rules.name: Decorative browser chrome
rules.description: Screenshot is wrapped in a fake browser frame with three traffic-light dots.

rules.name: Excessive Lucide-style icons
rules.description: Large number of icons share identical stroke width and size.

rules.name: One icon library only
rules.description: Every icon originates from the same generic outline library.

rules.name: Icon-semantic mismatch
rules.description: Icons are decorative and only loosely related to associated text.

rules.name: Sparkles icon overuse
rules.description: Sparkles, wand, stars or magic icons appear repeatedly.

rules.name: Abstract 3D object
rules.description: Hero contains floating sphere, torus, crystal, blob or abstract 3D shape.

rules.name: AI-generated illustration style
rules.description: Multiple images have inconsistent fine details, lighting or visual grammar.

rules.name: Inconsistent illustration families
rules.description: Assets use different line weights, perspectives or rendering styles.

rules.name: Stock-photo tokenism
rules.description: People images appear only as generic diversity or collaboration decoration.

rules.name: Circular avatar pile
rules.description: Three or more overlapping circular avatars appear near social proof.

rules.name: Fake product logos
rules.description: Logos or partner marks appear as invented generic symbols.

rules.name: Placeholder avatars
rules.description: Avatar sources use random-user, DiceBear or generic generated portrait services.

rules.name: Repeated SVG dimensions
rules.description: Many unrelated SVG icons share identical viewBox, dimensions and stroke attributes.

rules.name: Oversized decorative illustration
rules.description: Illustration occupies a major section but communicates little product information.

rules.name: Generic empty-state artwork
rules.description: Empty state uses abstract pastel illustration and generic message.

rules.name: Screenshot with impossible data
rules.description: Product screenshot contains inconsistent dates, totals, charts or currency.

rules.name: Asset filename fingerprints
rules.description: Files use names such as hero-image, dashboard-mockup, feature-1, generated-image.

rules.name: Universal fade-up
rules.description: Three or more sections animate from opacity 0 and translateY 20-40px.

rules.name: Staggered card reveal
rules.description: Sibling cards reveal with incremental delay.

rules.name: Infinite logo marquee
rules.description: Logo row continuously scrolls horizontally.

rules.name: Infinite testimonial marquee
rules.description: Testimonials move continuously without user control.

rules.name: Floating animation
rules.description: Decorative elements oscillate vertically with infinite animation.

rules.name: Pulse glow CTA
rules.description: Main CTA repeatedly pulses, glows or scales.

rules.name: Rotating gradient
rules.description: Background or border gradient animates continuously.

rules.name: Cursor-following glow
rules.description: CSS variables updated from pointer coordinates control radial highlights.

rules.name: Parallax without narrative purpose
rules.description: Hero image, blobs or cards move at different scroll speeds.

rules.name: Magnetic button
rules.description: Button position subtly follows pointer movement.

rules.name: Number count-up
rules.description: Statistics animate from zero when entering viewport.

rules.name: Typewriter headline
rules.description: Main headline simulates typing or rotates generic keywords.

rules.name: Auto-rotating words
rules.description: H1 contains periodically replaced words or phrases.

rules.name: Animated gradient text
rules.description: Text gradient shifts continuously.

rules.name: Excessive easing sophistication
rules.description: Many ordinary transitions use custom spring or cubic-bezier curves.

rules.name: Every element transitions
rules.description: Global styles apply transitions to all properties or all components.

rules.name: Scroll progress decoration
rules.description: Decorative progress line appears without long-form content need.

rules.name: Hover tilt card
rules.description: Cards rotate in 3D based on cursor position.

rules.name: Fake live activity
rules.description: Interface indicators pulse or update although data is static.

rules.name: Reduced-motion omission
rules.description: Many animations exist without prefers-reduced-motion support.

rules.name: Generic transformative headline
rules.description: Regex concepts: transform, reimagine, revolutionize, unlock, elevate.

rules.name: Built for pattern
rules.description: Repeated copy such as Built for teams that.

rules.name: Everything you need
rules.description: Exact or semantically similar generic value proposition.

rules.name: All-in-one platform
rules.description: Product described as an all-in-one solution without precise scope.

rules.name: Power of AI phrase
rules.description: Copy contains Harness/Unlock the power of AI.

rules.name: Supercharge language
rules.description: supercharge your workflow/productivity/business.

rules.name: Seamless overuse
rules.description: Word seamless/seamlessly appears more than once.

rules.name: Effortless overuse
rules.description: effortless, effortlessly, with ease used repeatedly.

rules.name: Next-level language
rules.description: next-level, next generation, future of.

rules.name: Vague efficiency promise
rules.description: Save time and focus on what matters without measurable detail.

rules.name: Three-adjective sentence
rules.description: Copy repeatedly lists three positive adjectives, such as fast, secure and scalable.

rules.name: Em-dash marketing sentence
rules.description: Many paragraphs use a short claim followed by an em dash explanation.

rules.name: Generic feature titles
rules.description: Titles such as Lightning Fast, Secure by Design, Built to Scale.

rules.name: Repeated Whether you
rules.description: Multiple sections begin with Whether you're.

rules.name: Unverifiable social proof
rules.description: Trusted by thousands without source, number or link.

rules.name: Fake precision
rules.description: Claims such as 10x faster, 300% growth without methodology.

rules.name: Placeholder metrics
rules.description: Statistics use round numbers such as 10K+, 99.9%, 50+.

rules.name: Generic testimonials
rules.description: Testimonials contain only broad praise and no product-specific detail.

rules.name: Repetitive testimonial tone
rules.description: Multiple quotes use similar sentence length, punctuation and vocabulary.

rules.name: Suspicious customer identities
rules.description: Testimonials use generic names, roles and company names.

rules.name: Generic CTA labels
rules.description: Excessive use of Get Started, Learn More, Try Now, Explore.

rules.name: CTA inconsistency
rules.description: Same destination is labeled differently across the page.

rules.name: Headline without product noun
rules.description: H1 promises an outcome but does not say what the product is.

rules.name: Vague product description
rules.description: First paragraph does not identify target user, mechanism or concrete output.

rules.name: Repeated sentence templates
rules.description: Multiple paragraphs share the same grammatical structure.

rules.name: Excessive positive adjectives
rules.description: High ratio of promotional adjectives to concrete nouns.

rules.name: Low information density
rules.description: Copy contains many claims but few domain-specific entities or actions.

rules.name: Fake urgency
rules.description: Limited spots, Join before it's too late, or countdown with no basis.

rules.name: Generic FAQ questions
rules.description: FAQ contains standard objections unrelated to the specific product.

rules.name: Placeholder legal copy
rules.description: Privacy, terms or copyright text contains generic or incomplete company information.

rules.name: Excessive generic div usage
rules.description: More than 85% of structural elements are <div>.

rules.name: Weak semantic structure
rules.description: Page lacks <main>, <section>, <nav>, <header> or <footer>.

rules.name: Repeated component skeleton
rules.description: Multiple DOM subtrees have nearly identical tag and class structure.

rules.name: Deep wrapper nesting
rules.description: Median component nesting depth exceeds six levels.

rules.name: Single-child wrapper chains
rules.description: Three or more consecutive elements each contain only one child.

rules.name: Decorative empty elements
rules.description: Empty <div> or <span> elements exist only for blobs, glows or shapes.

rules.name: Excessive span wrapping
rules.description: Headings contain many spans solely for color or animation control.

rules.name: Unnecessary duplicated markup
rules.description: Desktop and mobile variants duplicate substantial content.

rules.name: Generic section IDs
rules.description: IDs such as features, benefits, how-it-works, testimonials, pricing, faq all appear.

rules.name: Template section order
rules.description: Page sequence exactly follows hero then logos then features then testimonials then pricing then FAQ then CTA.

rules.name: Empty anchor links
rules.description: Links use href=#, empty href or placeholder JavaScript.

rules.name: Fake button links
rules.description: <a> elements styled as buttons lead nowhere or to generic anchors.

rules.name: Missing real navigation
rules.description: Navigation links only scroll to landing-page sections.

rules.name: Duplicate CTA destinations
rules.description: Many visually distinct CTAs point to the same placeholder URL.

rules.name: Excessive ARIA patching
rules.description: Non-semantic divs use ARIA roles to imitate native controls.

rules.name: Generated class naming
rules.description: Repetitive names such as section-container, feature-card, badge-wrapper dominate.

rules.name: Numbered feature data
rules.description: Repeated components are hard-coded with names like feature1, feature2, feature3.

rules.name: Placeholder alt text
rules.description: Images use alt values like Hero image, Dashboard, Feature image.

rules.name: Identical alt and filename
rules.description: Alt text is derived directly from generic asset filename.

rules.name: Missing content hierarchy
rules.description: Multiple H1 elements or skipped heading levels occur.

rules.name: Arbitrary-value overload
rules.description: High number of Tailwind arbitrary classes such as w-[...], top-[...], shadow-[...].

rules.name: Utility-class wall
rules.description: Elements contain more than 15 utility classes on average.

rules.name: Repeated long class strings
rules.description: Similar long utility-class sequences appear across components.

rules.name: Contradictory utilities
rules.description: Same element contains conflicting responsive, spacing or display classes.

rules.name: Unused generated CSS
rules.description: More than 40% of selectors are never matched by the DOM.

rules.name: Duplicate declarations
rules.description: Near-identical rule blocks occur under different selectors.

rules.name: Excessive !important
rules.description: More than five declarations use !important.

rules.name: Global transition abuse
rules.description: transition: all appears more than three times.

rules.name: Magic-number positioning
rules.description: Many absolute offsets use unrelated pixel values.

rules.name: Mechanical spacing scale
rules.description: Nearly all spacing values are exact multiples of 4 or 8.

rules.name: Excessive one-off values
rules.description: More than 20 unique spacing values occur on a single page.

rules.name: Mixed unit systems
rules.description: px, rem, em, vw and percentages are used inconsistently for similar properties.

rules.name: Repeated media queries
rules.description: Same breakpoint is declared in many disconnected locations.

rules.name: Desktop-first patching
rules.description: Mobile rules mostly override fixed desktop sizes rather than define fluid layout.

rules.name: Fixed component dimensions
rules.description: Cards, mockups or sections use rigid widths and heights that break with content.

rules.name: Excessive absolute positioning
rules.description: More than 15 meaningful elements use absolute positioning.

rules.name: Negative-margin composition
rules.description: Multiple sections rely on large negative margins for overlap effects.

rules.name: Excessive z-index values
rules.description: Many unique z-index values or values above 1000 exist.

rules.name: Random z-index escalation
rules.description: Values such as 10, 20, 50, 100, 999, 9999 appear together.

rules.name: Unnecessary GPU promotion
rules.description: Many elements use translateZ(0), will-change or transform without animation need.

rules.name: Generated custom-property names
rules.description: Variables use generic names such as --primary, --secondary, --muted, --card only.

rules.name: Large token set with low usage
rules.description: Many design tokens are defined but most are referenced zero or one time.

rules.name: Inline-style density
rules.description: More than 15% of elements contain inline style attributes.

rules.name: CSS-in-JS duplication
rules.description: Repeated static styles are embedded in multiple generated components.

rules.name: Excessive calc expressions
rules.description: Many simple dimensions are expressed using unnecessary calc().

rules.name: Unnecessary clamp use
rules.description: clamp() is applied mechanically to many unrelated font and spacing values.

rules.name: Over-specific selectors
rules.description: Generated selectors contain long chains or unnecessary specificity.

rules.name: Dead hover states
rules.description: Hover styles are declared for hidden, disabled or non-interactive elements.

rules.name: Duplicate keyframes
rules.description: Similar fade, float or pulse animations exist under different names.

rules.name: Framework-default tokens
rules.description: Default shadcn/Tailwind CSS variables remain unchanged.

rules.name: Hero simply stacks on mobile
rules.description: Two-column hero changes directly to one column without rethinking hierarchy.

rules.name: Hidden decorative overflow
rules.description: Mobile CSS hides overflowing mockups instead of adapting them.

rules.name: Desktop mockup remains oversized
rules.description: Device or dashboard image exceeds viewport width on small screens.

rules.name: Fixed heading size failure
rules.description: H1 remains above 56px on narrow screens.

rules.name: Buttons overflow
rules.description: CTA row does not wrap or switch to vertical layout below 400px.

rules.name: Arbitrary breakpoint accumulation
rules.description: Similar layout changes occur at many near-duplicate breakpoints.

rules.name: Mobile content disappearance
rules.description: Important content is hidden on mobile for layout convenience.

rules.name: Horizontal carousel fallback
rules.description: Card grid becomes an uncontrolled horizontal overflow strip.

rules.name: Fixed-height clipping
rules.description: Sections with fixed height clip translated or wrapped content.

rules.name: Text overflow masking
rules.description: overflow: hidden is used to conceal responsive text problems.

rules.name: No intermediate tablet design
rules.description: Layout jumps directly from wide desktop to narrow mobile.

rules.name: Identical mobile card style
rules.description: Every section becomes the same full-width rounded card stack.

rules.name: Mobile nav content mismatch
rules.description: Mobile menu contains different or missing navigation destinations.

rules.name: Touch target weakness
rules.description: Interactive targets are smaller than 44x44 CSS pixels.

rules.name: Hover-dependent information
rules.description: Important information appears only on hover.

rules.name: Viewport-unit mobile bugs
rules.description: 100vh is used without dynamic viewport handling.

rules.name: Absolute decorations cause overflow
rules.description: Decorative elements extend page width on small screens.

rules.name: Excessive mobile overrides
rules.description: Mobile stylesheet changes dozens of individual values rather than component rules.

rules.name: Forced line breaks survive mobile
rules.description:
Heading
elements create awkward mobile wrapping.

rules.name: Screenshot text becomes unreadable
rules.description: Product screenshot is scaled until embedded text is illegible.

rules.name: Low text contrast
rules.description: Text/background contrast fails WCAG AA.

rules.name: Muted text too light
rules.description: Secondary copy consistently falls below 4.5:1 contrast.

rules.name: Missing image alt
rules.description: Meaningful images have empty or missing alt attributes.

rules.name: Decorative image mislabeling
rules.description: Decorative images contain verbose generic alt text.

rules.name: Missing form labels
rules.description: Inputs use placeholder text as their only label.

rules.name: Missing focus styles
rules.description: Buttons and links remove outline without an alternative.

rules.name: Inaccessible custom controls
rules.description: Div-based accordions, tabs or toggles lack keyboard support.

rules.name: Incorrect button semantics
rules.description: Clickable divs or spans are used instead of buttons.

rules.name: Color-only state
rules.description: Selected, error or success state is expressed only through color.

rules.name: Auto-playing motion
rules.description: Infinite animation starts automatically without pause controls.

rules.name: No reduced-motion handling
rules.description: Animated page lacks prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: Invalid heading hierarchy
rules.description: H1-H6 order is inconsistent or headings are chosen for size only.

rules.name: Empty links
rules.description: Links have no accessible name.

rules.name: Icon-only controls unlabeled
rules.description: Icon buttons lack aria-label or visible text.

rules.name: Generic aria labels
rules.description: Labels such as button, icon, or click here are used.

rules.name: Language missing
rules.description: <html lang> is absent or incorrect.

rules.name: Form errors not associated
rules.description: Error text is not connected through ARIA attributes.

rules.name: Autocomplete omitted
rules.description: Common identity and payment fields lack autocomplete attributes.

rules.name: Modal focus not trapped
rules.description: Modal exists without dialog semantics and focus management.

rules.name: Content order mismatch
rules.description: Visual order differs substantially from DOM or keyboard order.

rules.name: Fake product interface
rules.description: Hero shows a polished product UI, but no functional product route exists.

rules.name: Screenshot-only product
rules.description: Product is represented only through static images.

rules.name: No concrete workflow
rules.description: Features describe benefits but no real input-process-output sequence.

rules.name: Placeholder navigation
rules.description: Dashboard links and controls point nowhere.

rules.name: Fake notifications
rules.description: Product mockup displays static notification counters or activity.

rules.name: Impossible user data
rules.description: Different sections show inconsistent usernames, totals or account states.

rules.name: Fake integrations
rules.description: Integration logos exist without integration pages, links or documentation.

rules.name: Generic API claim
rules.description: Page claims API availability but provides no documentation link.

rules.name: Fake security claims
rules.description: Enterprise-grade security appears without details, policy or certification.

rules.name: Empty trust pages
rules.description: Security, privacy or compliance links lead to thin placeholder pages.

rules.name: Fake partner logos
rules.description: Partner logos are unlinked and unsupported by case studies.

rules.name: No company identity
rules.description: Footer lacks legal entity, address, team or verifiable contact information.

rules.name: Inconsistent product naming
rules.description: Product name differs between title, logo, metadata and page copy.

rules.name: Inconsistent prices
rules.description: Pricing values differ between cards, FAQ, structured data or checkout links.

rules.name: Invalid app-store buttons
rules.description: Store buttons are present but have placeholder or nonexistent URLs.

rules.name: Coming-soon contradiction
rules.description: Page says coming soon while showing mature usage statistics or testimonials.

rules.name: Fake live demo
rules.description: Demo UI is pre-scripted but presented as interactive or real-time.

rules.name: Placeholder contact data
rules.description: Email uses example domains or generic fake values.

rules.name: Missing error states
rules.description: Product preview shows only perfect success states.

rules.name: Unrealistically complete feature set
rules.description: Early product claims many unrelated advanced capabilities.

rules.name: Default page title
rules.description: Title remains Vite App, Next App, Landing Page or similar.

rules.name: Generic meta description
rules.description: Metadata contains vague AI-style marketing copy.

rules.name: Missing canonical URL
rules.description: Public production page has no canonical link.

rules.name: Missing Open Graph data
rules.description: Product page lacks basic social metadata.

rules.name: Placeholder favicon
rules.description: Default framework favicon remains.

rules.name: Framework asset leftovers
rules.description: Default Vite, React, Next or Astro assets are still included.

rules.name: AI builder identifiers
rules.description: Source contains comments or metadata mentioning v0, Lovable, Bolt or generated output.

rules.name: Generated component comments
rules.description: Comments such as Generated by AI, Replace with your content or TODO placeholders.

rules.name: Placeholder structured data
rules.description: JSON-LD contains generic organization or example values.

rules.name: Inconsistent locale
rules.description: Page language, metadata locale and visible copy do not match.

rules.name: Incorrect copyright year
rules.description: Footer year is stale or inconsistent with current deployment metadata.

rules.name: Broken internal references
rules.description: IDs, anchors, files or component references do not exist.

rules.name: Development URLs
rules.description: Localhost or preview deployment URLs remain in production source.

rules.name: Exposed environment placeholders
rules.description: Values such as YOUR_API_KEY, YOUR_DOMAIN or ${SITE_URL} appear.

rules.name: Duplicate metadata
rules.description: Multiple title, viewport or description tags exist.

rules.name: Generic image metadata
rules.description: Social image uses a default template or unrelated placeholder.

rules.name: Missing asset optimization
rules.description: Hero images are oversized and lack responsive source sets.

rules.name: Random generated asset hashes
rules.description: Many one-off images have opaque generated names without organization.

rules.name: Empty manifest fields
rules.description: PWA manifest exists but contains template names or colors.

rules.name: Template robots/sitemap
rules.description: Sitemap or robots configuration references a template domain.
